order.description:
This is the order that the these items are assigned for a given carrier.
The lower the number, the "smaller" the item is.
This is used to determine which item type is used when converting consingment items to carrier items.
ie. if an item can be a carton or a large carton, the carton order is lower so the carton is selected.

Pro rataing is only considered if an item is bigger then the largest carrier item (ie. item with the largest order)

carrierItemTypeId.description: if a carrier item type is not provided then this is the default breaks

breakTo.description: the maximum for this current break. If this is null, it is infinite

fuelSurchargeId.description: this is taken from the carrierAccountService.

accumulateTime.description:
When true, all time breaks calculate a route by accumulating the various breaks.
When false, a route is calculated by time * number of hours

accumulateDistance.description:
When true, all distance breaks calculate a route by accumulating the various breaks.
When false, a route is calculated by distance * number of kms

accumulateWeight.description:
When true, all weight breaks calculate a route by accumulating the various breaks.
When false, a route is calculated by weight * number of kms

accumulatePieces.description:
When true, all pieces breaks calculate a route by accumulating the various breaks.
When false, a route is calculated by weight * number of kms

accumulatePalletSpaces.description:
When true, all pallet space breaks calculate a route by accumulating the various breaks.
When false, a route uses a singular matching break

defaultTimeDuration.description: This is the default time for each lane rate for this service. This gets used if no transit duration is specified for a lane rate

defaultDistanceDuration.description: This is the default distance for each lane rate for this service. This gets used if no transit duration is specified for a lane rate

serialisedCustomFields.description:
String'ed version of the carrier reference to this service.
This should only ever be used for carrier integration

consignmentBatchingAllowed.description:
A flag indicating whether this service allows Consignment Batching - ie multiple consignments
to be booked at once

allowConsignmentConsolidation.description:
This flag controls whether other consignments can be consolidated into a consignment of this service, and if
consignments of this service can be consolidated onto other consignments. Machship.Common.Models.Carriers.Carrier.AllowConsignmentConsolidation
will have to be set to true in addition to this for consolidation to happen

carrierAccounts.description: List of all the carrier accounts that point to the surcharge for a given account

carrierId.description: Id of the Carrier this Zone Set belongs to

CarrierZoneSetLite.description: A lightweight version of the CarrierZoneSet object

limitToRatecardSellRates.description: When set to true, prices will only price when there is a sell rate for that lane (and the breaks cover the consignment's items)

CompanyCarrierAccountLite.description: Stripped back details of the Company Carrier Account

carrierItemTypeId.description: if a carrier item type is not provided then this is the default breaks

breakTo.description: the maximum for this current break. If this is null, it is infinite

carrierItemTypeName.description:
Query parser cant handle nulls in related properties. ie. item.carrieritemtype.name
This getter handles the null value so that the parser doesn't have to

carrierItemTypeAbbreviation.description:
Query parser cant handle nulls in related properties. ie. item.carrieritemtype.name

markupPercentage.description: This is used by the routing engine when this surcharge is based on a percentage rather than a price

When true then the consignment is never going to be sent to the carrier and exists in MachShip purely

doNotConsolidate.description:
Set this flag to true when you do not want to consolidate, rather you just want the consignments to be returned to be abl
to perform a bulk update

companyId.description:
The Machship Company ID that consolidation should be performed for - if omitted it will be performed against the company
of the user performing consolidation

unmanifestedConsignmentIds.description:
Optional - list of unmanifested consignment IDs to attempt to consolidate. Will not be considered if Machship.Common.Models.Consolidation.ConsolidationOptions.ConsolidationTarget is set to Machship.Common.Models.Consolidation.Enums.ConsolidationTarget.Pending.
If omitted all unmanifested consignments will be used to attempt consolidation.

pendingConsignmentIds.description:
Optional - list of pending consignment IDs to attempt to consolidate. Will not be considered if Machship.Common.Models.Consolidation.ConsolidationOptions.ConsolidationTarget is set to Machship.Common.Models.Consolidation.Enums.ConsolidationTarget.Unmanifested.
If omitted all pending consignments will be used to attempt consolidation.

groupByCarrier.description: Whether the carrier will be considered when consolidating consignments

groupByService.description: Whether the service will be considered when consolidating consignments (only relevant when Machship.Common.Models.Consolidation.ConsolidationOptions.GroupByCarrier is also set to true)

groupByReferenceOne.description: Whether the first customer reference be used when grouping consignments for consolidation

groupByReferenceTwo.description: Whether the second customer reference be used when grouping consignments for consolidation

groupByDespatchDate.description: Whether the despatch date be used when grouping consignments for consolidation

companyId.description: The Machship Company ID that consolidation should / has been performed against

validationResults.description: A list of validation results from the consolidation process

PrinterStatus.description:
This enum is used by the "Machship App" to report on whether the printer is connected to it
or not. Initially the app will likely just return unknown0 = Unknown, 1 = Online, 2 = Offline, 3 = NoHandshake

selected.description: Nullable. If this is null, it has not been explicitly set. if it is true or false, then it has been set by something

This is a model that is passed on from the API to provide the raw details that could not be properly normalised / converted into
validated data (locations, services etc) but can serve as a guide for a human to select valid items from.

carrier account.

service.

blank they will be routes for the company associated with the authorised user.

TrackingStatus.description:
Note that this enum reflects the entries in the ConsignmentTrackingStatus table.
The Enums integer values should map to the id field of the status.

Also note that if any statuses are added in here, then they also may need to be added in the ConsignmentTrackingHistoryService.GetEligibleNewStatusesForConsignment()
logic when determining which statuses can be changed into a different status1 = Quote, 2 = Unmanifested, 3 = Manifested, 4 = Booked, 5 = InTransit, 6 = Delayed, 7 = Complete, 8 = Lost, 9 = Damaged, 10 = Cancelled, 13 = OnForDelivery, 14 = AddedToMachship, 15 = PickedUp, 16 = ScannedIntoDepot, 17 = DeliveryAttempted, 18 = SortedForDelivery, 19 = PartialDelivery, 20 = DeliveryTimeScheduled, 21 = Deleted, 22 = AtDelivery, 23 = PartialOnForDelivery, 24 = AtPickup, 25 = Manifesting, 26 = TrackingExpired, 27 = FailedPickup, 28 = FailedDelivery, 29 = AwaitingCollection, 30 = CompleteReturnedToSender
